3166950.name: Arcade Reflex
3166950.description: Arcade Reflex takes the essence of classic arcade games and gives it a modern twist. You control a paddle, navigating through fast-paced levels where the gameplay keeps evolving. It starts off simple, but the challenges quickly ramp up, so you’ll need sharp reflexes. The minimalist design nods to retro games, but there’s more depth here than meets the eye. Perfect for quick sessions, Arcade Reflex offers a fresh take on the arcade formula. Ready to see how far you can climb on the leaderboards?
3166950.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
